title: Claim for damages for personal injury and loss consequential on that injury

evidence.clean_text: 20.	The claim is for damages for personal injury (and loss consequential on that injury) in the form of psychiatric injury suffered by the Claimant as a result of learning that: (a) the text messages were malicious messages sent by or on behalf of the Defendant; (b) learning that he had been subject to surveillance; and (c) the attack in Knightsbridge; and the physical damage suffered as a result of the Knightsbridge attack.
